item.text: I’ll use Blast to delete P2’s full-health forward raider with two capped hits, reinforce the center lane, and recruit another raider.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-015.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-015\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":2},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-015.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-015.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-015.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-015\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":6,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"deckDamage\":1},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-015.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-015.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-015.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-015.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-015.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, removed P2'"'s full-health forward raider with two capped hits, reinforced the center, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: spend Blast damage across separate attacks to beat the cap, trade the wounded raider's tempo into a high-value kill, keep fresh raiders moving into the center lane, and continue converting supply into pressure.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-015.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-015.board.result.json"'

item.text: The reinforcing raider could not reach adjacency to the full-health target. I’m changing the attacks to remove the 1 HP raider and leave the other forward raider at 1 HP, which is the strongest valid tempo line from these positions.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-015.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-015\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-009-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"deckDamage\":1},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-008-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-015.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-015.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-015.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-015.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-015.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Blast, removed P2'"'s wounded raider, pushed the other forward raider to 1 HP, reinforced the center, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: use capped Blast damage for immediate combat tempo, trade the wounded P1 raider into severe damage on P2's active threat, clear the 1 HP raider with a fresh attacker, and keep recruiting raiders to sustain pressure.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-015.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-015.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-015`.

Deck line: played `blast`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `5` money and `2` damage.

Board line: moved raiders to `(7,5)` and `(8,3)`, recruited `P1-raider-turn-015-1` at `(10,1)`, removed `P2-raider-turn-008-1`, and dealt `7` damage to `P2-raider-turn-010-1`.

Rationale: this uses Blast for immediate combat tempo, clears one P2 raider, leaves another at 1 HP, and keeps the raider stream moving into the center. Strict validation passed.
